description.zh: 宋朝实行二府三司制，中书门下掌行政，枢密院掌军事，三司掌财政，三权分立、互不统属。崇文抑武，以文驭武，建立了中国历史上文官治国最彻底的政治体系。理学兴盛，注重程序正义，决策讲求论证。
description.en: The Song Dynasty implemented the Two Offices Three Commissions system: Zhongshu-Menxia for administration, Privy Council for military, and Three Commissions for finance—three powers separated and independent. It established the most thorough civilian-supremacy system in Chinese history, with Neo-Confucianism emphasizing procedural justice and evidence-based decisions.
